description.unified: Deals Physical Damage to all enemies and knocks them back.

Deals Physical Damage 3 times to enemies in front. Each hit knocks them down for [1 sec -> 1.2 sec] and increases [Physical Damage -> their Physical Damage] taken by [8% -> 30%] for 7 sec. [ (removed) This effect stacks up to 3 times].
Deals Physical Damage 5 time to a random enemy and nearby enemies, reducing their Attack Speed by [12% for 8초간 -> 40% for 10 sec]. Against non-hero enemies, deals an additional Physical Damage.

On Normal Attack, fires an additional projectile that deals extra Physical Damage to all enemies and increases [your -> your] Attack by 0.5% for 10 sec. The Attack increase stacks up to 100 times and cannot be dispelled.

dark.unified: Attack is increased by [50% -> 45%] for 4 sec.

description.unified: [Roll Over] increases DMG by {0}% on every use and recovers 120 MP upon a Crit Hit. This effect stacks up to max 10 times.

dark.unified: On hit, gains [Darkness] stacks equal to the number of enemies struck. When [Darkness] reaches 50 stacks, all [Darkness] is [removed -> consumed] and you enter [Rampage] for 10 sec, increasing Attack Speed by [48% -> 80%] and Attack by [25% -> 20%].
